dependency_chain: istio/istio uses RouteConfiguration from envoyproxy/go-control-plane, which is generated from envoyproxy/data-plane-api protobuf definitions

steps.description: Usage site - Istio RDS generator creates RouteConfiguration objects
steps.context: BuildSidecarOutboundHTTPRouteConfig constructs RouteConfiguration with VirtualHosts for outbound HTTP traffic routing
steps.code_snippet:
out := &route.RouteConfiguration{
	Name:                           routeName,
	VirtualHosts:                   virtualHosts,
	ValidateClusters:               proto.BoolFalse,
	MaxDirectResponseBodySizeBytes: istio_route.DefaultMaxDirectResponseBodySizeBytes,
	IgnorePortInHostMatching:       true,
}

steps.description: Generated Go code - RouteConfiguration struct from protobuf
steps.context: Generated Go struct for RouteConfiguration containing route table configuration with virtual hosts, headers, and validation settings

steps.description: Original proto definition - RouteConfiguration message in data-plane-api
steps.context: Protobuf message definition for RouteConfiguration, the canonical source for Envoy's HTTP routing configuration structure

verification_notes.verification_method: Direct file inspection via GitHub raw content URLs
